task: Create a meme with a frog as the background and leave the only text with "Enjoy your life".
graderReasoning: The agent completed the task. The trajectory shows it generated a frog-themed meme image locally with the only text 'Enjoy your life' (see the canvas drawing code in step 28), then uploaded that PNG to Imgur via the New post flow. The upload succeeded: the post page displayed a share link 'https://imgur.com/a/hhVmHRY' in step 35, and step 37 confirmed the uploaded image source 'https://i.imgur.com/h3gFllo.png' with dimensions 1080x1080. This is sufficient evidence that the meme was created and uploaded on Imgur.
final_result_response:
